utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six. Each item is fully specified: property has description, address, price, size, amenities, and fees; financing includes lender, mortgage type, interest rate, amortization, down payment, mortgage amount, and monthly payment; legal_services has provider, list of services, and cost; moving_services has provider, services, and cost; setup_services lists utilities with providers, approximate costs, and setup cost; total_budget contains a detailed cost breakdown. All items are fully detailed as per requirements.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution describes the purchase of a modern 1+1 bedroom condo in downtown Toronto for CAD $465,000. In the ground-truth ratings, the available purchase options include 'Modern Apartment' (CAD $520K, rating 9), 'New Build' (CAD $480K, rating 10), and others. The AI’s property is closest in description and price to 'Modern Apartment'—it is modern, central, and slightly above the user's budget range, similar to the Modern Apartment profile. For financing, the chosen 5-year fixed-rate mortgage from Scotiabank seems to align most closely with 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 8) since it requires a 20% down payment and lacks mention of first-time buyer incentives. The legal services provider appears to be a full conveyancing package suitable for a first-time buyer but at a moderate cost (CAD $2,300), which aligns most closely with 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 8) as it suggests comprehensive coverage at a higher cost. The moving service selected ('Toronto City Movers', CAD $1,300) fits the description of 'Premium Moving' (rating 7) because it includes packing assistance and insurance, and the cost is similar to that tier. The utility setup (electricity, internet, included water/gas) costs CAD $400 total, which aligns with 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9) due to high-speed internet and eco-conscious features matching the user profile.
